hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bears are capitulating and rotating out as BTC bounces off support, pushing this down 10 points in 24h, suggesting smart money thinks a $45K floor is less likely than the market's pricing it. At 47%, you're getting paid 1.1-to-1 for a move that requires a 35% drawdown from here, which severely undervalues the tail risk if macro turns or a major exchange implodes.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Looks Too Cheap at 47%, Here's Why
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dipped 10 points overnight to 47%, signaling the market is pricing in a major 2026 collapse from current levels. But the math doesn't work. A move to $45K requires 25-30% downside from here, and that's only happening if macro breaks hard or crypto regulation goes full scorched earth. Smart money is backing the contrarian play: this line is soft and worth fading on the long side.
